case_title: GUAN HUA KUANG VS. LURA LEE BEAUMONT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. PROCESS SERVER FOR THE PLAINTIFF APPEARED TODAY FOR THE 1:30 PM CALENDAR ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF, INDICATING HE WAS APPEARING BECAUSE THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE AN INTERPRETER AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE SO THAT PLAINTIFF COULD HAVE THE DEFENDANT SERVED. PROCESS SERVER APPEARED AGAIN AT 2:55 PM AND STATED HE HAD MADE A MISTAKE IN REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE AND THAT THE PLAINTIFF WANTED THE MATTER TAKEN OFF OF CALENDAR. ORIGINAL ORDER WORKSHEET REMAINS IN COURT FILE ALONG WITH HE DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KUANG, GUAN HUA AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUMONT, LURA LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
